commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh You shall yet plant vines upon the mountains of Samaria: the planters shall plant, and shall eat them as common things. Its wine was famous, Judges ix. (Josephus, Jewish Wars iii. ) Time, three years being elapsed, Leviticus xix. (Calmet) Protestants, "plant, and shall eat (marginal note, profane) them as common things. "They shall not be too greedy, (Haydock) but shall have leisure to enjoy the fruits of their labour.
